panel.title: Writing Settings
panel.description: Define the goal, style, and constraints first, then generate content.

storage.title: Settings are currently stored in browser cache
storage.description: This is suitable for personal preferences and the most recent writing setup. If you need cross-device sync later, move user presets to the database.

placeholder.topic: Example: Write a review article about rolling out a knowledge base product
placeholder.audience: Example: product managers, operations teams, enterprise clients
placeholder.keywords: One per line, or separated by commas
placeholder.referenceContent: Paste background notes, meeting notes, competitor info, or raw material
placeholder.mustInclude: Example: mention launch context, core features, and outcome
placeholder.avoidWords: Example: avoid exaggerated claims, hard-sell language, and slang
placeholder.extraRequirement: Example: end with 3 actionable suggestions and keep paragraphs concise

tooltip.creativity: Higher values make the output more divergent. Lower values keep it steadier.

summary.title: Current Summary
summary.emptyTopic: No topic yet. Start from the topic first.

editor.title: Writing Area
editor.description: You can continue refining the prompt here or edit the final content directly.
editor.emptyTitle: Configure your writing requirements on the left first
editor.emptyDescription: After you set the topic, style, length, and other options, click “Generate Prompt” to create a usable prompt draft on the right.
